title: N@tophah #5199
definition:
Netophah = "dropping"

 1) a town in Judah resettled by the exiles returning from Babylon
    with Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:

 1) a town in Judah resettled by the exiles returning from Babylon
    with Zerubbabel
